parameters.jsCode:
const body = $json.body || $json;

const tarefa = body.tarefa || body.prompt || body.texto || 'Criar ou ajustar uma automação no n8n com Docker.';
const contexto = body.contexto || 'PC local Windows com Docker Desktop, n8n self-hosted, Postgres, Redis, Worker, VS Code, Codex e Antigravity.';

const prompt = [
  'Você é um agente sênior de automação, DevOps, n8n, Docker e desenvolvimento assistido por IA.',
  '',
  'OBJETIVO:',
  tarefa,
  '',
  'CONTEXTO:',
  contexto,
  '',
  'REGRAS:',
  '1. Antes de alterar qualquer coisa, analise o cenário e explique o plano.',
  '2. Priorize Docker Compose, dados persistentes, backup e rollback.',
  '3. Gere comandos testáveis para PowerShell/WSL.',
  '4. Nunca invente credenciais, tokens ou senhas.',
  '5. Quando precisar de API key, use variável de ambiente ou peça ao usuário.',
  '6. Para n8n, pense em nodes, credenciais, triggers, webhooks, tratamento de erro e logs.',
  '7. Para Codex/Antigravity, entregue passos objetivos, arquivos a criar/editar e testes finais.',
  '8. Ao final, entregue checklist de validação e como desfazer se algo quebrar.',
  '',
  'ENTREGA ESPERADA:',
  '- Plano curto',
  '- Arquivos/comandos',
  '- Testes',
  '- Possíveis riscos',
  '- Próximo passo recomendado'
].join("\n");

return [
  {
    json: {
      prompt,
      recebido: body,
      como_usar: 'Envie POST para http://localhost:5678/webhook/assistente-dev com JSON: {"tarefa":"sua tarefa aqui"}'
    }
  }
];

const d = $input.first().json;
const st = d._status || "success";
const summ = d._blocked_reason ||
  (d._answer_data ? d._answer_data.answer.substring(0,80) : null) ||
  (d._capa_result ? "CAPA Rascunho: " + d._capa_result.capa_id : null) ||
  (d._verification_result ? "Doc verificado: " + d._verification_result.document_id : null) ||
  d.message || st;
return [{json: {
  correlation_id: d.correlation_id, request_id: d.request_id,
  status: st, agent: "knowledge",
  workflow: "KNOWLEDGE - RAG Auditoria",
  summary: summ,
  data: {
    answer: d._answer_data ? d._answer_data.answer : "",
    sources: d._answer_data ? d._answer_data.sources : (d._retrieved ? d._retrieved.sources : []),
    confidence: d._answer_data ? d._answer_data.confidence : 0,
    gaps: d._answer_data ? d._answer_data.gaps : [],
    document: d._sync_result || d._verification_result || {},
    entity_memory: d._entity_memory || {},
    audit: d._audit_result || {},
    quality: d._quality_result || {},
    capa: d._capa_result || {},
    portal_synced: false
  },
  missing_fields: (d._validation ? d._validation.missing : null) || [],
  requires_approval: d._requires_approval || false,
  approval_id: d._approval_id || null,
  risk_level: d._risk_level || "low",
  next_action: st === "sources_found" ? "review_sources"
    : st === "no_sources" ? "escalate_to_human"
    : st === "document_synced" ? "verify_index"
    : st === "document_outdated" ? "quality_review"
    : st === "quality_review_required" ? "escalate_quality"
    : st === "capa_draft_ready" ? "approve_capa"
    : st === "needs_info" ? "request_more_info"
    : "none"
}}];

parameters.content:
## TESTE
Manual Trigger com dados simulados.
Nao chama vector db, email ou IA real.

## MOCK
Webhook POST /webhook/vesper/knowledge/rag-auditoria
runtime_mode=MOCK
Simula documentos e historico.

## PORTAL
runtime_mode=PORTAL
Base: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_BASE_URL
Token: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_API_KEY

## PGVector PG SQL
Conexao futura com pgvector no PostgreSQL.
Nao requer conexao real nesta v1.

## Error Audit
ID: LpsYX0AkHTdZKw7P
Settings > Error Workflow: vincular a este ID

## Chamada de Agentes
Compras, Comercial, Producao e Interno podem usar Execute Workflow.

## Fontes de Dados
Nunca inventar normas, precos, prazos ou clientes sem fonte homologada.

## Endpoints Futuros Portal
GET /api/files
GET /api/files/{id}
POST /api/knowledge/index
POST /api/knowledge/query
GET /api/knowledge/sources
GET /api/knowledge/entity-memory
POST /api/auditoria/logs
GET /api/auditoria/by-correlation/{id}
POST /api/auditoria/search
POST /api/qualidade/nao-conformidades
POST /api/qualidade/capa
POST /api/automation/audit

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'Conectado com sucesso!', autor: 'Antigravity Master Agent', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.content:
## CORE - Gateway Supervisor

**Modo TESTE**: Use Manual Trigger. Payload com runtime_mode=TESTE.

**Modo MOCK**: Use Webhook POST /webhook/vesper/core/gateway com runtime_mode=MOCK.

**Modo PORTAL**: Use Webhook com runtime_mode=PORTAL.

Conectado diretamente a sub-workflows reais via Execute Workflow.

nodes.name: ERROR - Send to Core Error Audit

main.node: ERROR - Send to Core Error Audit

parameters.content:
=== GUIA DE USO DO WAR ROOM ===

1. Como usar TESTE:
   Envie runtime_mode = 'TESTE'. Retorna métricas simuladas sem chamadas externas.

2. Como usar MOCK:
   Envie runtime_mode = 'MOCK'. Simula dados realistas das tabelas virtuais.

3. Como usar PORTAL:
   Envie runtime_mode = 'PORTAL'. Fará requisições HTTPS para as APIs do Vesper.

4. Endpoints futuros do Portal:
   GET /api/ia/workflows/status
   GET /api/auditoria/logs
   GET /api/automation/dead-letters
   GET /api/automation/approvals
   GET /api/ia/logs

=== INTEGRAÇÕES E SUPORTE ===

5. Como o Portal chama este workflow:
   Via Webhook POST /vesper/war-room/observability.

6. Como ler Approvals/Errors/Audit:
   Consolida payloads de dead letters, aprovações pendentes e logs.

7. Link com Error Audit:
   Se houver falha interna, dispara POST /webhook/vesper/core/error-audit.

8. Resumo Diário Automático:
   Pode ser agendado via Schedule Trigger e executa a ação 'daily_summary'.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const out = {
  correlation_id: d.correlation_id,
  request_id: d.request_id,
  status: d.status || "success",
  agent: "war_room",
  workflow: "WAR ROOM - Observability",
  summary: d.summary || "Observability metrics gathered and consolidated.",
  data: {
    health: d.data?.health || {},
    agents: d.data?.agents || [],
    workflows: d.data?.workflows || [],
    errors: d.data?.errors || {},
    dead_letters: d.data?.dead_letters || {},
    approvals: d.data?.approvals || {},
    costs: d.data?.costs || {},
    audit: d.data?.audit || {},
    alerts: d.data?.alerts || [],
    recommendations: d.data?.health?.recommends || d.data?.dead_letters?.recommendations || [],
    portal_synced: d.portal_synced || false,
    snapshot_id: d.data?.snapshot_id || null
  },
  missing_fields: d._validation?.missing || [],
  requires_approval: d._requires_approval || false,
  approval_id: d.approval_id || null,
  risk_level: d.risk_level || "low",
  next_action: d.next_action || ""
};
return [{json: out}];

nodes.name: DISABLED - Send Daily War Room Summary

parameters.content: ### Webhook URL\nNo n8n, a URL final de produção para este Webhook será:\n`/webhook/vesper/core/error-audit`

parameters.subject: =[Vesper Error Alert] - Severity: {{$json.risk_level}}
parameters.html:
=

Vesper Automation Error Alert

An error occurred in workflow {{$json.data.source_workflow}} on node {{$json.data.failed_node}}.

Message: {{$json.data.error_message}}

Severity: {{$json.risk_level}}

Next Action: {{$json.next_action}}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const st = d._status || "success";
const summ = d._blocked_reason ||
  (d._ticket ? d._ticket.title : null) ||
  (d._suggested_solution ? d._suggested_solution.first_response.substring(0,80) : null) ||
  (d._daily_summary ? "Resumo do dia gerado" : null) ||
  d.message || st;
return [{json: {
  correlation_id: d.correlation_id, request_id: d.request_id,
  status: st, agent: "interno",
  workflow: "INTERNO - Portal Assistant",
  summary: summ,
  data: {
    classification: d._classification || {},
    ticket: d._ticket || {},
    asset: d._asset || {},
    certificate: d._certificates ? {list:d._certificates, alerts:d._cert_alerts||[]} : {},
    suggested_solution: d._suggested_solution || {},
    notification: d._notification || {},
    access_request: d._access_request || {},
    onboarding: d._onboarding || {},
    daily_summary: d._daily_summary || {},
    close_result: d._close_result || {},
    approval_id: d._approval_id || null,
    portal_synced: false
  },
  missing_fields: (d._validation ? d._validation.missing : null) || [],
  requires_approval: d._requires_approval || false,
  approval_id: d._approval_id || null,
  risk_level: d._risk_level || "low",
  next_action: st === "ticket_created" ? "assign_ticket"
    : st === "asset_found" ? "review_asset"
    : st === "certificate_alert" ? "renew_certificate"
    : st === "notification_prepared" ? "send_notification"
    : st === "approval_pending" ? "wait_for_approval"
    : st === "daily_summary_ready" ? "review_summary"
    : st === "needs_info" ? "request_more_info"
    : "none"
}}];

parameters.content:
## TESTE
Manual Trigger com dados simulados.
Nao chama Portal, email ou acesso real.

## MOCK
Webhook POST /webhook/vesper/interno/portal-assistant
runtime_mode=MOCK
Simula tickets, ativos, certificados.

## PORTAL
runtime_mode=PORTAL
Base: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_BASE_URL
Token: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_API_KEY
Nao executar acao sensivel sem aprovacao.

## Gateway -> Interno
Gateway ID: IkWAyy2BUsVgN4to
Futuro: Execute Workflow ou POST /webhook/vesper/interno/portal-assistant

## Approval Center
ID: aY5nyRrZ3ugYT6ZH
Acionado em: password_access_request, onboarding_request
approval_type: it_access

## Error Audit
ID: LpsYX0AkHTdZKw7P
Settings > Error Workflow: vincular a este ID
Ou POST /webhook/vesper/core/error-audit

## Futuro: Chat/HelpDesk/TI
IMAP para e-mail de suporte
Chat Interno via webhook
Controle TI: inventario, assets, CMDB
HelpDesk real: tickets, SLA, historico

## Endpoints Futuros Portal
POST /api/helpdesk/tickets
GET /api/controle-ti/assets
GET /api/controle-ti/certificados/vencendo
POST /api/helpdesk/tickets/{id}/close
POST /api/chat/messages
POST /api/interno/notificacoes
POST /api/automation/audit

## CORE - Approval Center

1. Use TESTE mode to mock approval locally without side effects.
2. Use MOCK mode for data table persistence without portal sync.
3. PORTAL uses HTTP Requests.
4. Future workflows can call via Execute Workflow or Webhook.

Endpoints:
- POST /webhook/vesper/core/approval/request
- POST /webhook/vesper/core/approval/respond
- Portal will be expected at POST /api/automation/approvals

parameters.jsCode: const d=$input.first().json;if(d._material?.op_id){d._kanban={status:"prepared",op_id:d._material.op_id,note:d.runtime_mode==="PORTAL"?"TODO: POST /api/kanban/cards/{id}/activities":"MOCK: kanban_activity_prepared=true"};}return [{json:d}];
const d=$input.first().json;d._error_note="TODO: vincular Error Audit Dead Letter nas Settings";return [{json:d}];

const d = $input.first().json;
const best = d._comparison?.ranking?.[0]||null;
const status = d._status||(d._needs_info?"needs_info":"success");
const out = {
  correlation_id: d.correlation_id,
  request_id: d.request_id,
  status: status,
  agent: "compras",
  workflow: "COMPRAS - Procure to Pay Agent",
  summary: d._approval_reason||d._blocked_reason||(d._quotation?.note)||status,
  data: {
    purchase_request_id: d._quotation?.quote_id||"",
    op_id: d._material?.op_id||"",
    material: d._material||{},
    selected_suppliers: d._selected_suppliers||[],
    quotation: d._quotation||{},
    supplier_replies: d._supplier_replies||[],
    comparison: d._comparison||{},
    approval_id: d._approval_id||null,
    purchase_order_id: d._purchase_order?.po_id||null,
    portal_synced: d._portal_synced||false
  },
  missing_fields: d._validation?.missing||[],
  requires_approval: d._requires_approval||false,
  approval_id: d._approval_id||null,
  risk_level: d._risk_level||"low",
  next_action: status==="purchase_order_draft"?"confirm_with_supplier":
               status==="approval_pending"?"wait_for_approval":
               status==="comparison_ready"?"request_approval":
               status==="quote_ready"?"send_to_suppliers":
               status==="needs_info"?"request_more_info":"none"
};
return [{json:out}];

parameters.content:
## Modo TESTE

Use Manual Trigger com:
{"runtime_mode":"TESTE","message":"Comprar chapa fina galvanizada 0.80 1000x2000 10 unidades para OP 123"}

Sem chamadas reais. Sem email. Sem compra.

## Modo MOCK

Webhook POST /webhook/vesper/compras/procure-to-pay
runtime_mode=MOCK.
Simula fornecedores e cotacoes.
Data Tables: vesper_purchase_requests, vesper_quote_requests, etc

## Modo PORTAL

runtime_mode=PORTAL
Base URL: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_BASE_URL
Token: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_API_KEY
Nao hardcode credenciais.

## Gateway -> Compras

Gateway ID: IkWAyy2BUsVgN4to
Futuro: Execute Workflow node no Gateway apontando para este workflow.
Ou: POST /webhook/vesper/compras/procure-to-pay

## Approval Center

ID: aY5nyRrZ3ugYT6ZH
Em PORTAL: Execute Workflow ou POST /webhook/vesper/core/approval/request
Em MOCK: simular appr_compras_xxxxx

## Endpoints Portal

GET /api/compras/materiais/search
GET /api/compras/fornecedores
GET /api/compras/historico-precos
POST /api/compras/requisicoes
POST /api/compras/cotacoes
POST /api/compras/cotacoes/{id}/emails
POST /api/compras/pedidos
POST /api/automation/audit
POST /api/kanban/cards/{id}/activities

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const st = d._status || "success";
return [{json: {
  correlation_id: d.correlation_id, request_id: d.request_id,
  status: st, agent: "producao",
  workflow: "PRODUCAO - Kanban OP Agent",
  summary: d._blocked_reason || d._approval_note || (d._analysis ? d._analysis.summary : d.message) || st,
  data: {
    op: d._op_context || {}, card: d._op_context || {},
    analysis: d._analysis || {},
    risks: d._risk_level ? [d._risk_level] : [],
    alerts: d._alerts || [],
    material_request: d._compras_payload || {},
    kanban_comment: d._kanban_comment || {},
    compras_payload: d._compras_payload || {},
    daily_report: d._daily_report || {},
    move_result: d._move_result || {},
    approval_id: d._approval_id || null,
    portal_synced: false
  },
  missing_fields: (d._validation ? d._validation.missing : null) || [],
  requires_approval: d._requires_approval || false,
  approval_id: d._approval_id || null,
  risk_level: d._risk_level || "low",
  next_action: st === "analyzed" ? "create_alert"
    : st === "alert_created" ? "comment_card"
    : st === "compras_triggered" ? "await_compras_response"
    : st === "comment_prepared" ? "check_compras"
    : st === "approval_pending" ? "wait_for_approval"
    : st === "daily_report_ready" ? "review_report"
    : st === "needs_info" ? "request_more_info"
    : "none"
}}];

parameters.content:
## TESTE
Manual Trigger com dados simulados.
Nao chama Portal.
Nao move card real.

## MOCK
Webhook POST /webhook/vesper/producao/kanban-op
runtime_mode=MOCK
Simula OP, card, checklist, materiais e alertas.

## PORTAL
runtime_mode=PORTAL
Base: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_BASE_URL
Token: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_API_KEY
Nao alterar OP/card critico sem aprovacao.

## Gateway -> Producao
Gateway ID: IkWAyy2BUsVgN4to
Futuro: Execute Workflow ou POST /webhook/vesper/producao/kanban-op

## Producao -> Compras
Compras ID: k2Ss9Ct4aHKf67cf
Futuro: Execute Workflow ou POST /webhook/vesper/compras/procure-to-pay
Payload: compras_payload do resultado

## Approval Center
ID: aY5nyRrZ3ugYT6ZH
Acionado em: move_card_request, EX/INMETRO
approval_type: critical_kanban_move|ex_area_validation

## Error Audit
ID: LpsYX0AkHTdZKw7P
Settings > Error Workflow: vincular a este ID
Ou POST /webhook/vesper/core/error-audit

## Endpoints Futuros Portal
GET /api/producao/ops/{id}
GET /api/kanban/cards/{id}
POST /api/kanban/cards/{id}/comments
POST /api/producao/ops/{id}/material-request
POST /api/producao/ops/{id}/alerts
POST /api/kanban/cards/{id}/move
POST /api/notifications
POST /api/automation/audit

parameters.jsCode: const d=$input.first().json;d._status='win_loss_registered';d._win_loss={proposal_id:d.payload?.proposal_id,result:d.payload?.result||'unknown',reason:d.payload?.reason||'',note:d.runtime_mode==='PORTAL'?'TODO: POST /api/propostas/{id}/win-loss':'MOCK: win_loss_logged'};return [{json:d}];
const d=$input.first().json;d._error_note='TODO: vincular LpsYX0AkHTdZKw7P nas Settings';return [{json:d}];

const d = $input.first().json;
const st = d._status || "success";
return [{json:{
  correlation_id: d.correlation_id, request_id: d.request_id,
  status: st, agent: "comercial",
  workflow: "COMERCIAL - Quote to Cash Agent",
  summary: d._blocked_reason||d._approval_note||d._proposal?.title||st,
  data: {
    customer: d._customer||{}, demand: d._demand||{},
    proposal: d._proposal||{}, template: d._template||{},
    draft: d._proposal||{}, approval_id: d._approval_id||null,
    pdf: d._pdf||{}, send_result: d._send_result||{},
    followup: d._followup||{}, portal_synced: false
  },
  missing_fields: d._validation?.missing||[],
  requires_approval: d._requires_approval||false,
  approval_id: d._approval_id||null,
  risk_level: d._risk_level||"low",
  next_action: st==="draft_created"?"request_approval":
    st==="technical_review_required"?"complete_technical_specs":
    st==="approval_pending"?"wait_for_approval":
    st==="pdf_ready"?"send_proposal":
    st==="sent_placeholder"?"schedule_followup":
    st==="needs_info"?"request_more_info":"none"
}}];

parameters.content:
## TESTE
Manual Trigger:
```json
{"runtime_mode":"TESTE","message":"Proposta exaustor axial para galpao"}
```
Sem chamadas reais.

## MOCK
Webhook POST /webhook/vesper/comercial/quote-to-cash
runtime_mode=MOCK
Simula cliente, template, rascunho e follow-up.

## PORTAL
runtime_mode=PORTAL
Base: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_BASE_URL
Token: $env.VESPER_PORTAL_API_KEY
Nao hardcode credenciais.

## Gateway -> Comercial
Gateway ID: IkWAyy2BUsVgN4to
Futuro: Execute Workflow ou POST /webhook/vesper/comercial/quote-to-cash

## Approval Center
ID: aY5nyRrZ3ugYT6ZH
Em PORTAL: Execute Workflow
Em MOCK: appr_comercial_xxxx simulado

## Endpoints Portal
POST /api/propostas/drafts
POST /api/propostas/{id}/generate-pdf
POST /api/propostas/{id}/send
POST /api/propostas/{id}/followup
GET /api/clientes/search
POST /api/automation/audit

## IMAP/SMTP/PDF Futuro
IMAP: n8n Email Trigger (nao ativo v1)
SMTP: EmailSend desativado
PDF: puppeteer/portal backend
NUNCA enviar email real direto nesta v1
